text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: New Year's Day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many students have gone home for the winter
break. With them gone for the next few days, the
academy has been quiet and still, like a fire's
gone out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the change of pace, I can't afford to just
lounge around. This year, my trainee's entering
her all-important classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I review last year's race results and training logs
before carefully writing up a plan for this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, Admire Vega will be facing the
incredibly trying Classic Triple Crown tour. No
amount of preparation can be enough for this
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I enthusiastically press on with
my tasks, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gurgle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite making sure to bring everything I need
for work, I completely forgot to prepare any
food. I'm also entirely out of ready-to-eat meals
and snacks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With fingers crossed, I visit the nearby shopping
district, only to find that everywhere is closed
due to the holiday.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Happy New Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega returns my greeting. She's wearing a
tracksuit, and her cheeks are slightly flushed—it
appears she's already started training diligently.
choice_data_list: Are you doing some shopping too?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yes, I ran out of sports drink powder...
choice_data_list:
Aren't we lucky convenience stores are open on
New Year's Day?

Aren't we lucky convenience stores are open on
New Year's Day?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yes, it's a big help... always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing her throw out the word "always," I
suddenly realize she likely doesn't return home,
even during the holidays.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has her reasons, which I certainly can't
change, but...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going to finish my shopping. See you...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as we bumped into each other, I offer to
help finish her shopping while I get my lunch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her tenacious refusal, I convince her to
let an adult handle things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I decide to throw in a little extra while I'm
at it. But what to choose?
choice_data_list: A hot snack to cheer her up.
Something sweet to clear her mind.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What's this?
choice_data_list:
I thought you could use it. It's cold outside, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega starts to eat the piping hot meat
bun, so I take a bite out of the one I got for
myself.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Are you okay? Is it too hot for you?
choice_data_list: Yeah, a little I guess... Not you?
Yeah, a little I guess... Not you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm fine... I don't have a problem with hot food.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
They say you should eat without letting the food
touch the tip of your tongue. I don't know if it
works, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a bit, I enjoy my delicious meat bun.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It isn't one with any extra stuff in it, is it?
choice_data_list: Like a New Year's gift kinda thing?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: A what?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Never mind... Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's cold out.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(And dreary... I guess because the others aren't
here.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ah, that reminds me...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ahh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...So warm.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh, a dessert?
choice_data_list: They called it the Fluffy Vanilla Soufflé!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You... really didn't need to.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (So soft...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whirrrr... Whirrrr...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay. I just have to wait for the laundry to dry.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Fluffy...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Munch.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It is fluffy!)
